news.author: Mike Pearl
news.title: OpenAI Announces Unnerving New ChatGPT Feature Named ‘Lockdown Mode’
news.description: "Lockdown Mode is not intended for everyone," OpenAI's blog post says. In other words, you're probably not important enough.
news.content:
OpenAI just announced Lockdown Mode. Remember lockdown? It’s like that, but with an AI chatbot.
Actually, it’s pitched as a way of protecting you from prompt injection attacksan insidious new kind o… [+1921 chars]

news.title: SpaceX’s Stratospheric IPO Launch Has a Couple of Heavy-Duty Stowaways
news.description: Big tech says its circular dealmaking is a virtuous dealmaking. To others it looks more like a noose.

news.title: OpenAI’s IPO Filing Might Be Just Days Away: Report
news.description: With its trial wrapped up, the company behind ChatGPT is ready to let things rip.
news.content:
OpenAI, one of the companies most responsible for pushing generative AI into the mainstream with its popular ChatGPT LLM, could file for an initial public offering (IPO) by the end of this week.
